content.full_text:
April 14, 2005

Merrie Lee John
Administrative Assistant
Chawanakee Unified School District
P.O. Box 400
North Fork, CA 93643

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-059

Dear Ms. John:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation on April 12, 2005, you have withdrawn your request for written advice.

If you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Carla Wardlow
Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division
